title: Pseudo status bar component with polling and warning display
purpose: Displays project status information including file counts, prose breakdown, scanning progress, and warnings. Polls for updates and handles loading/error states.

steps.content: Initialize state for status and error tracking.
Set up a polling interval to fetch status updates from the backend.
IF the component is still mounted, update the status state with fetched data.
IF an error occurs during fetch, update the error state with the error message.
Return an error message if an error is present.
Return a loading indicator if no status is available yet.
Calculate and display scanning progress if available.
Display warning count if any warnings exist.
Fetch the latest status from the backend using the provided fetchStatus function.
IF the component is still mounted, update the status state with the fetched data.
IF the fetch operation fails, update the error state with the error message.
